docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $738.26 FILED BY MARIANS AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ZIPPORAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJ. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100/MO BEG. ON 8/13/04 & ON THE 13TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-16-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-09-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES. SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES, CASE CON'T FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100/MO BEG. 8/13/04 & ON THE 13TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-14-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-16-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. SETTLEMENT BET. THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMT OF $814.26 INCLUDING COURT COSTS. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR SIX MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF IN FULL AT WHICH TIME THE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-09-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-09-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-05-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTD. FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO 4/5/06 AT 10:00 A.M AND POSSIBLE DISMISSAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ZIPPORAH NO APPEARANCES AT PROGRESS REPORT. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL SENT TO ZIPPORAH ROBINSON RETURNED SIGNED
PAYMENTS ARE MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
